title: sphaeralcea angusta
intro: Sphaeralcea angusta, also known as narrow globemallow, is a perennial plant species in the mallow family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Sphaeralcea angusta have been linked to its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and it is often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
